title: Formspec Validation Report
description: A standalone Validation Report aggregating all validation results for a Response at a point in time (§5.4).

definitionUrl.description: The canonical URL of the Definition that was validated against.

definitionVersion.description: The version of the Definition that was validated against.

valid.description: true if and only if the results array contains zero entries with severity 'error'.

results.description: All validation results regardless of severity.

counts.description: Counts of results by severity level.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time indicating when validation was performed.
